hero.title: The Command Center for Your Entire Ride-Hailing Fleet
hero.subtitle: Maximize vehicle utilization, streamline driver payouts, and slash operational overhead. Fahrly gives modern fleet owners the real-time visibility and automated tools needed to scale profit per mile.

valueProps.heading: Why managing a fleet feels like a losing battle right now
valueProps.subtitle: Traditional fleet management tools weren't built for the rapid, on-demand nature of modern ride-hailing networks.

items.title: Where are my drivers and why is revenue dipping?
items.body: You are constantly shifting between multiple driver apps and spreadsheets just to track basic metrics. Without consolidated real-time tracking, unassigned vehicles sit idle, costing you money every minute.

items.title: The manual payout nightmare
items.body: Calculating complex commission splits, fuel deductions, and performance bonuses manually drains hours of leadership time every week—and a single data entry error kills driver trust.

items.title: Reactive, expensive maintenance
items.body: Relying on drivers to self-report vehicle issues means you only find out a car is broken after it breaks down on a shift. Unexpected repairs crush your weekly utilization targets.

features.heading: Three steps to absolute fleet control
features.subtitle: Three steps from problem to solved.

items.title: Plug into your existing platforms
items.body: Seamlessly connect Fahrly with Uber, Lyft, Bolt, or your custom ride-hailing software via native APIs. Import your vehicle roster and driver profiles in under ten minutes.

items.title: Automate dispatch and driver workflows
items.body: Let Fahrly track live vehicle locations, automate shift handovers, and calculate localized dynamic performance bonuses instantly without manual oversight.

items.title: Watch your profit margins expand
items.body: Minimize vehicle downtime using predictive maintenance alerts, retain your best drivers with fast, accurate payouts, and make data-backed scaling decisions.

pricing.heading: Simple pricing built to scale with your fleet
pricing.subtitle: No surprises. Pick what fits. Monthly • Annual • Save 20%

faq.heading: Common questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before you decide.

items.question: Does Fahrly replace our ride-hailing provider apps?
items.answer: No, Fahrly works alongside them. We integrate directly with platforms like Uber, Lyft, and Grab to aggregate your operations, tracking data, and earnings into a single consolidated hub built strictly for the business owner.

items.question: How exactly does the automated payout engine work?
items.answer: You set the parameters—such as base rental fees, fuel splits, or commission percentages. Fahrly automatically processes the incoming ride data, runs calculations per driver, and generates ready-to-pay transaction invoices with zero manual math required.

items.question: Is there a long-term contract requirement?
items.answer: Not at all. Both our Starter and Pro plans are billed month-to-month, allowing you to cancel or adjust your subscription tier seamlessly as your vehicle count fluctuates.

finalCta.heading: Ready to take control of your fleet?
finalCta.subtitle: Join the operators already scaling their revenue per mile.
